localizations.title: Action Story
localizations.hint_5: Stella flees through the portal. Find a way to chase her through the air.
localizations.hint_6: You will have to use this powerful weapon twice to unnerve Stella.
localizations.hint_8: The glove box padlock looks like a number. But how do you open it?
localizations.hint_10: Useful for drying many and varied things.
localizations.hint_12: Now that the water's spirit is freed, all that remains to do is to bring it back to its native land.
localizations.hint_13: This road seems like the best way to get closer to Stella's balloon.
localizations.hint_15: Stella is somewhat out of range. You will have to speed up to avoid losing her.
localizations.hint_16: Water and paper don't go well together. And you have no time to wait for the plane to dry.
localizations.hint_18: This threatening catapult won't come in handy right away. Wait until you have an enemy to sink.
localizations.hint_19: This train must be stopped even if it's too big and powerful. So, make the best out of the surroundings.
localizations.hint_20: Bring the water back to these lands. And did you take cards 80 and K?
localizations.hint_24: Stella must be held back. Your car has a way to do this. And did you take card 41?
localizations.hint_26: The plane works. But where is Stella?
localizations.hint_28: One of this toy's four wagons holds the sheriff's gold bars, but how do you know which one?
localizations.hint_29: It's common knowledge that rock beats scissors. Now, all that's left to do is to find the scissors to beat.
localizations.hint_30_first: This mirror is really nice, but it won't be of any use until the end of the adventure.
localizations.hint_30: Use the mirror when building your robot. Find out how it can block one of Stella's robot's devastating weapons.
localizations.hint_32: Stella's balloon is in sight again. Don't forget to take card 16.
localizations.hint_35: Are you sure you took cards 10, 20, 30, 57, and 95?
localizations.hint_36: This looks like a nasty situation. You have to get out of this car before it crashes into the ravine.
localizations.hint_37_first: Little Bear is well equipped, but what are these swords in the real world?
localizations.hint_37: Remember that Little Teddy Bear is just a stuffed animal with scissors. What usually beats scissors?
localizations.hint_39: You don't really have anything else than your hands to wipe down that windshield.
localizations.hint_40: Paper beats rock. But you don't need to beat rock.
localizations.hint_41_first: Start by finding a way to grab hold of Stella's car.
localizations.hint_41: Now that your grapnel is thrown, drag it from underneath this card. What do you read?
localizations.hint_47: This magnificent plane glides in the air. It's now a much better means to catch up with Stella than your car.
localizations.hint_52: The airplanes trails form a number.
localizations.hint_54_first: This bottle is filled to the top, but it won't be of use until the end of the adventure.
localizations.hint_54: Use the bottle when building your robot. Find out how it can block one of Stella's robot's devastating weapons.
localizations.hint_55: One of the train wagons holds the Sheriff's gold, but first, you must find a way to stop it.
localizations.hint_57_first: The trash can lid can be used for a shield, but it won't be of use until the end of the adventure.
localizations.hint_57: Use the lid when building your robot. Find out how it can block one of Stella's robot's devastating weapons.
localizations.hint_58: These mean pirates deserve to be sunk!
localizations.hint_59_first: Here comes Stella's vile robot. You can block each of its weapons using objects in your possession. Find which ones.
localizations.hint_59: Use card 98 to build your robot. For each card forming the robot you will find a clue for the correct gem color.
localizations.hint_63: To catch up with Stella, you have to shoot at two things depicted in this scene.
localizations.hint_66: Once you have folded the plane, look closely at its wings. Also, did you take card 5?
localizations.hint_67_first: You only need to remove one plank for this structure to collapse. Which one to choose?
localizations.hint_67: If you remove the wobbly plank, what do you see among the remaining red planks?
localizations.hint_70_first: You will use this machine several times throughout the adventure. First things first! Catch up with Stella.
localizations.hint_70: Once the turbo has been activated, the grapnel can be used to prevent Stella from fleeing. If push comes to shove, you have the ejector seat.
localizations.hint_71_first: You must make Stella's car slide. Find a way to spill a slippery liquid in front of it.
localizations.hint_71: Now that the road is covered in oil, have the car roll over the spillage on the road card. What do you see?
localizations.hint_75: You can direct the wind with your finger. Feel free to give several jolting taps to move the parachute.
localizations.hint_78: Scissors beat paper. But you don't need to beat paper.
localizations.hint_79: Have your grapnel slide forward from under your car. What do you read?
localizations.hint_80: Where has the water gone? And where the "B" and the "P" should be removed from?
localizations.hint_82: After shooting at Stella's car, have it slide over this slippery spillage.
localizations.hint_87_first: This small and powerful magnet won't be of use until the end of the adventure.
localizations.hint_87: Use the magnet when building your robot. Find out how it can block one of Stella's robot's devastating weapons.
localizations.hint_90: Wind up the mechanism. What does it form?
localizations.hint_93: Find a way to turn this vacuum cleaner off.
localizations.hint_95: It's very unlikely this comb will be of any use.
localizations.hint_98: Find and position the 4 body parts of your robot on this card. Each part will have to block the corresponding weapon on Stella's robot.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Send your paper plane (47) through the portal (5) to catch Stella.
localizations.answer_hint_8: The locked padlock forms an 8. When open, it forms a 6.
localizations.answer_hint_12: Bring the water's spirit (12) back to the arid lands (20) to reawaken life in this place and recover your plane.
localizations.answer_hint_13: Take your car (+24) and chase after Stella (13).
localizations.answer_hint_15: Turn the turbo on (+48) and chase after Stella (15).
localizations.answer_hint_16: Dry the plane (16) with the hairdryer (10).
localizations.answer_hint_24: Use the grapnel ("add +12") on Stella's car (24) to prevent her from fleeing.
localizations.answer_hint_26: Use the plane (26) to chase after Stella's balloon (32).
localizations.answer_hint_28: On card 19, spot the gold in the 3rd wagon. Bring it back (+5) to the Sheriff (55).
localizations.answer_hint_36: Use the ejector seat (+13) to escape from the car (36).
localizations.answer_hint_37: Spot the link between the swords on this card and the scissors on the playmat. Then, use the stone card (29) to beat Little Bear's scissors (37).
localizations.answer_hint_39: Swipe the screen with your finger to clean it.
localizations.answer_hint_52: Follow the planes trajectory. If you rotate the card, you will see number 35.
localizations.answer_hint_58: Bomb the pirates (58) using your catapult (18).
localizations.answer_hint_59: Use the mirror (30) to reflect the laser, the lid (57) to protect yourself from the sword, the bottle (54) to put out the dragon's fire, and the magnet (87) to attract the metal leg. Next, spot the robot's blue head in the drawing. Finally, use the colors of each card to turn the gems on in the machine.
localizations.answer_hint_63: Shoot the pistol (6) at Stella's car (+65) and the tanker (+76).
localizations.answer_hint_66: Fold the robot plan according to the 3 instructions. You can see number 47 above the wings.
localizations.answer_hint_67: Remove the wobbly red plank. You can then see a red +9 among the remaining planks. Combine it with the train (19).
localizations.answer_hint_71: Shoot also at the tanker. Then, slide this card on card 82. You can see numbers 3 and 9 thanks to the tire marks left on the oil spillage.
localizations.answer_hint_75: When pushing the parachute, a number is revealed underneath.
localizations.answer_hint_79: When sliding this card from under your car (41), you can read "add twelve". So, add 12 to Stella's car (24).
localizations.answer_hint_80: The water is in the bottle. Remove letters B and P from the label. Now, you can read number 12 spelled out.
localizations.answer_hint_82: Also shoot at Stella's car. Then, slide card 71 along card 82. You can see numbers 3 and 9 thanks to the tire marks left on the oil spillage.
localizations.answer_hint_93: Unplug the vacuum cleaner in the app.
localizations.machine_39: By the time you finish cleaning the windshield of your car, you find yourself nose to nose with Stella.
localizations.aspirateur: This huge mouth was nothing but a vacuum cleaner. Once again, we were lucky! It seems your room wasn't very tidy. Everything's back to normal now that it's unplugged, you will be able to resume your adventure. Anyhow, where were we?
localizations.machine_70_turbo: You turn the turbo on, the engine roars!
localizations.machine_70_hook_early1: Stella is too far off to be reached with this grapnel.
localizations.machine_70_hook_early2: Stella takes a zigzag course. Your grapnel isn't fast enough.
localizations.machine_70_hook: The grapnel springs from under your speedster.
localizations.machine_70_eject_early: Do you want to eject yourself in the middle of the road? Really?
localizations.machine_70_eject: Your car roof opens, then your seat unlocks, ready to be ejected.
localizations.machine_59: You build a robot together using the relics found during your journey. Your robot beats Stella's in a prodigious fight. Finally, you can retrieve the rock, uh... no, not the rock... the famous magic stone! Either way, supreme evil has been overcome. You did great!
